scripts.build: npm run build:concat && npm run build:js && npm run build:css
scripts.build:concat: cat public/js/src/01-constants.js public/js/src/02-utils.js public/js/src/03-api.js public/js/src/04-auth.js public/js/src/05-navigation.js public/js/src/06-account.js public/js/src/07-live-streaming.js public/js/src/08-overview.js public/js/src/09-mentions-proof.js public/js/src/10-analytics.js public/js/src/11-brand-setup.js public/js/src/12-run-queries.js public/js/src/13-diagnostics-admin.js public/js/src/14-advanced-views.js public/js/src/15-billing-wizard.js > public/js/app.js
